case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY VS. DEAYN M BOGER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY (CCP 585 (D); CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOGER, DEAYN M $7,541.03 PRINCIPAL, $1,100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $460.68 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,146.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, COST BILL $45.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BOGER, DEAYN M
